userStories.title: Video analysis and transcription
userStories.description: Analyze public/video.mp4 with ffprobe, transcribe with Whisper, generate data/storyboard.json based on transcript analysis. Identify sections, speaker changes, and key topics.
acceptanceCriteria: data/transcript.json exists with word-level timestamps
data/storyboard.json exists with sections array
Each section has startTime, endTime, type, and overlays
storyboard.json speakers array is populated

userStories.title: Base composition with source video
userStories.description: Update MainComposition.tsx to use OffthreadVideo playing public/video.mp4 full-frame. Set composition duration to match video duration. Use calculateMetadata for dynamic duration.
acceptanceCriteria: Composition compiles without TypeScript errors
Review frame at second 1 shows the source video correctly
Composition duration matches source video duration

userStories.title: Opening title overlay
userStories.description: Add OpeningTitle component as a Sequence in the first 3-4 seconds. Title text comes from storyboard.json edits.openingTitle or user prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: Title visible in review frame at second 2
Text within safe zone (60px from edges)
Font and color match CODEX.md style guide
Spring animation renders correctly at midpoint frame

userStories.title: Speaker name cards
userStories.description: Add NameCard components for each speaker at their first appearance time (from storyboard.json). Each card visible for 4 seconds with slide-in and fade-out.
acceptanceCriteria: Each speaker has a name card at the correct timestamp
Review frames show correct name and role text
Cards do not overlap with faces or other overlays
Enter and exit animations both work

userStories.title: Section transition titles
userStories.description: Add SectionTitle components at each section boundary from storyboard.json. Each visible for 3 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Each section transition has a title overlay
Titles match section names from storyboard
Timing aligns with transcript content shifts
No overlap with name cards

userStories.title: TikTok-style captions
userStories.description: Add AnimatedCaptions component using words from data/transcript.json. Captions cover the full video duration with word-by-word highlighting.
acceptanceCriteria: Captions sync with audio (spot-check 3 random moments)
No overlap with name cards or section titles
Font size 42px minimum, readable on dark and light backgrounds
Active word highlighted in accent color

userStories.title: Outro with logo
userStories.description: Add LogoOutro component in the last 4-5 seconds. Include logo if public/assets/logo.png exists, and website URL if provided.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo visible and centered in review frame
URL text readable below logo
Smooth fade to black at the very end
No abrupt cut - transition feels natural

userStories.title: Full review and final render
userStories.description: Render review frames at 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% of video. Check all quality criteria. Fix any remaining issues. Render final MP4 to out/final.mp4.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 review frames pass quality checklist
out/final.mp4 exists and file size > 0
No TypeScript compilation errors
Completion report printed to terminal
